===''Pokémon the Series''=== [[File:Valerie anime.png|thumb|250px|Valerie in {{aniseries|XY}}]] Valerie is the [[Laverre City]] [[Gym Leader]], as well as a famous fashion designer. She operates her fashion retail store and hosts fashion shows inside the [[Laverre Gym]]. She debuted in ''[[XY073|A Fashionable Battle!]]''. After {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} arrived in Laverre City, {{an|Serena}} became excited about the prospect of meeting her. When a fashion show was about to start, Valerie became unsure of what to do while preparing for the fashion show. [[Blossom]] and {{kal|Katherine}} brought over Serena and {{an|Bonnie}}, and Valerie recommended them to replace two participants who didn't show up for her fashion show. During the event, Valerie had a Gym battle, to showcase her designs, against [[Sawyer]] and easily defeated his {{p|Bagon}} with the help of her {{p|Spritzee}}'s speed. This battle caused Ash to realize that Valerie was going to be tough to deal with. In ''[[XY074|Fairy-Type Trickery!]]'', Valerie got to battle Ash next. When Ash and his friends arrived in the Laverre Gym, they initially noticed that Valerie was absent. She then made a grand entrance with flower petals to welcome Ash to the Gym. Beginning their two-on-two match, Valerie called out {{p|Sylveon}} first. After {{AP|Fletchinder}} defeated Valerie's Sylveon, Valerie sent out Spritzee next. Her strategy was revealed when she had Spritzee use {{m|Trick Room}}. This managed to defeat Fletchinder, as Fletchinder took too long with the multiple {{m|Flame Charge}}s during the stage Trick Room was active. Valerie dealt with Hawlucha next. By treating it as a wrestling ring, Hawlucha withheld Spritzee's attacks and then {{m|X-Scissor}}ed the Trick Room, shattering it. Spritzee was defeated by Hawlucha, thus defeating Valerie. The {{tc|Furisode Girl}}s commented that Valerie hadn't lost to anybody in a while. She then gave Ash the {{badge|Fairy}} as proof for defeating her. She reappeared in a flashback in [[XY075|the next episode]]. She appeared in a fantasy in ''[[XY125|A League of His Own!]]'', when Ash was talking to [[Everett]] about the Gym Leaders that he had defeated in Kalos, in order for him to be able to compete in the [[Lumiose Conference]]. In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', Valerie was seen in her Gym, watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with her Pokémon. In ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', Valerie and Spritzee were among those who helped to destroy the [[Giant Rock]]. She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''. ====Character==== Valerie is always poised and polite. Behind this, however, Valerie is bold and confident in how she conducts herself on the battlefield. Her Fairy Pokémon are trained with beauty and power, or what she calls "hidden fangs", in mind. Valerie is incredibly empathetic and revealed that she wishes to be a Pokémon. As a result, she has developed the unique ability to speak to some Pokémon, which allows her to use them to their full abilities in battle such as her {{p|Sylveon}}'s ribbons. She is also creative and has an eye for detail. Valerie believes that only nature represents true beauty, and often incorporates floral and Pokémon motifs in her fashion designs. Her designs are best showcased in battle, where their intricate details and the free-flowing movement of the materials come to life. ====Pokémon==== {{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Valerie |pkmn=Spritzee |type1=Fairy |img=Valerie Spritzee.png |epnum=XY073 |epname=A Fashionable Battle! |vajp=Hitomi Nabatame |vaen=Lisa Ortiz |desc={{p|Spritzee}} is Valerie's first known Pokémon. It was first seen with Valerie and her Pokémon before the fashion show began. During the fashion show, it battled [[Sawyer]]'s {{p|Bagon}}. When Bagon launched a {{m|Dragon Breath}}, Spritzee was completely unaffected by the move. After easily dodging Bagon's {{m|Headbutt}} attacks using its agility, it defeated Bagon with Dazzling Gleam. In ''[[XY074|Fairy-Type Trickery!]]'', Valerie chose Spritzee as her second and final Pokémon to battle {{Ash}} in his [[Laverre Gym]] battle. It defeated his {{AP|Fletchinder}} despite Fletchinder's supereffective attacks, but lost to {{AP|Hawlucha}} despite having a type advantage. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY075|Rivals: Today and Tomorrow!]]''. In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', it was seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Valerie. In ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', it helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]]. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''. Spritzee's known moves are {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}, {{m|Trick Room}}, {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Moonblast}}, and {{m|Light Screen}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Valerie |pkmn=Sylveon |type1=Fairy |img=Valerie Sylveon.png |epnum=XY073 |epname=A Fashionable Battle! |vajp=Chinatsu Akasaki |vaen=Erica Schroeder |desc={{p|Sylveon}} was briefly seen in its first appearance with the other Pokémon when Valerie prepared for her fashion show. In ''[[XY074|Fairy-Type Trickery!]]'', Sylveon battled {{Ash}} in his [[Laverre Gym]] battle. It proved to be a powerful opponent, using its ribbons to take control of its round against [[Ash's Fletchinder]] and dealing a close range Fairy Wind. However, it was eventually defeated by Fletchinder's supereffective {{m|Steel Wing}}. In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', it was seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Valerie. Sylveon's known moves are {{m|Disarming Voice}}, {{m|Fairy Wind}}, and {{m|Giga Impact}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Valerie |pkmn=Mr. Mime |type1=Psychic |type2=Fairy |img=Valerie Mr. Mime.png |epnum=XY073 |epname=A Fashionable Battle! |vaen=Kayzie Rogers |desc={{p|Mr. Mime}} was briefly seen with the other Pokémon when Valerie was preparing for her fashion show. In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', Mr. Mime was seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Valerie. None of Mr. Mime's moves are known.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Valerie |pkmn=Mawile |type1=Steel |type2=Fairy |img=Valerie Mawile.png |epnum=XY073 |epname=A Fashionable Battle! |vaen=Erica Schroeder |desc={{p|Mawile}} was briefly seen with the other Pokémon when Valerie was preparing for her fashion show. In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', Mawile was seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Valerie.
